title: Tripwire Alert
description: Highlighting tripwires only if they are attached to a hook, keeping the aesthetics of regular string untouched!
body:
# Overview
Tripwire Alert highlights attached tripwires as red, while highlights disarmed tripwires as light blue, while regular string remains its original texture!

Future updates will fix issues with emmisive textures.
# Why did I make this?
I've had enough off triggering tripwires in Hypixel skyblock dungeons...
# Join my Discord!
[Discord](https://discord.gg/invite/eYaAp3SqPA)
